privileged_info_summary: The task targets three specific WooCommerce products: Wireless Bluetooth Headphones (SKU: WBH-001), Organic Cotton T-Shirt (SKU: OCT-BLK-M), and Merino Wool Sweater (SKU: MWS-GRY-L). All three SKUs and product names match the setup specification. The task requires marking exactly 3 products as featured using the bulk edit feature. The data is synthetic, created by setup_woocommerce.sh via WP-CLI product creation. The database contains 12 total products created with standard prices and stock levels.
